summary: Extern/Dolphin THP slice from a larger matching-improvement branch. The only changed file was THPDec.c, where __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN was refactored to reuse the local THPFileInfo* info, replace a raw offset-derived mcuBuffer local with casts to THPFileInfoMCUBufferView, and access xPixelSize, components, and quantTabs through info. The PR was closed unmerged after being superseded by #2632 because the extern-only split hit an EditorConfig workflow edge case.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; updates __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN access patterns for THPFileInfo and MCU buffers.

what_changed.text: Removed local mcuBuffer initialized by raw byte offset cast `(THPCoeff**) ((u8*) info + 0x10)`.
Replaced mcuBuffer indexed uses with `((THPFileInfoMCUBufferView*) info)->mcuBuffer[index]` for Huffman decode and inverse DCT calls.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY/U/V calls now use THPFileInfoMCUBufferView casts
raw_diff: __THPInverseDCTNoYPos and __THPInverseDCTY8 calls now use THPFileInfoMCUBufferView casts

what_changed.text: Replaced repeated `__THPInfo->...` accesses with the local `info->...` pointer for xPixelSize, components, and quantTabs.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: component and quantTabs accesses changed from __THPInfo to info

what_changed.text: Kept existing typed overlay casts for restart and MCU-row fields, including `THPMCURowFields` and `THPRestartFields`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: loop condition still uses `((THPMCURowFields*) info)->MCUsPerRow`
raw_diff: restart block still uses `((THPRestartFields*) info)->RST` and `currMCU`

smart_moves.text: Reduced direct global `__THPInfo` reads after caching it in `info`, which makes related field accesses more consistent within the function.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: local `THPFileInfo* info = __THPInfo` retained and subsequent xPixelSize/components/quantTabs accesses use `info`

smart_moves.text: Changed raw offset access to a named view type for the MCU buffer, aligning the source with typed-field recovery rather than pointer arithmetic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: raw `(u8*) info + 0x10` mcuBuffer local removed
raw_diff: new `THPFileInfoMCUBufferView` casts at mcuBuffer call sites

smart_moves.text: Scoped this PR to a single extern Dolphin THP file as part of a larger directory/subsystem split for reviewability.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: `Split from #2617 by directory/subsystem so the matching improvements are easier to review.`

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a known struct-view type exists for a byte-offset region, replacing a raw offset local with the view type can make repeated buffer accesses more reviewable.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed raw offset mcuBuffer local

decomp_lessons.lesson: After caching a global pointer in a local, using the local consistently for nearby field accesses can simplify source and avoid mixed global/local access forms.

naming_conventions.text: The diff preserves short local role names already present in the function, including `info`, `comp`, `x_pos`, and `cl_num`.
The new type name `THPFileInfoMCUBufferView` describes a view over `THPFileInfo` for the MCU buffer region; the PR evidence does not show where this type was defined.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use a temporary view struct cast at each call site to express an offset-based buffer member without keeping a raw byte-offset local.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: `((THPFileInfoMCUBufferView*) info)->mcuBuffer[n]` used in decode and DCT calls
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR slice does not include a definition for THPFileInfoMCUBufferView or per-PR objdiff/CI results.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Retain explicit overlay casts for fields not represented directly on THPFileInfo, such as `THPMCURowFields` and `THPRestartFields`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: No review discussion confirms whether these overlays were considered final style.

review_feedback.author: fjooord
review_feedback.text: Superseded by the combined Dolphin support split PR #2632. The extern-only split hit the EditorConfig workflow edge case where all changed files are filtered out.

follow_up_queries: PR #2632 Dolphin support split THPDec.c THPFileInfoMCUBufferView
EditorConfig workflow edge case all changed files filtered out extern-only split

evidence_refs: human_pr_text: PR body with scope, preliminary report, and local checks
notes: The diff evidence is concrete for the single changed file and exact code edits.
The PR was a draft/closed unmerged slice and was superseded by #2632, so this intake should not treat the changes as landed or accepted.
The PR body reports only `git diff --check` for this slice; broader CI and score data are described as preliminary or from the full unsplit source branch.
No review comments are present, and there is no loaded per-PR objdiff/checkdiff output.
The type definition for `THPFileInfoMCUBufferView` is not included in the slice, so type-ownership conclusions should be curated cautiously.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer typed view access over raw byte-offset locals when recovering THPFileInfo subregions
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2618's THPDec.c diff, a raw mcuBuffer local derived from `(u8*) info + 0x10` was removed and call sites were rewritten to `((THPFileInfoMCUBufferView*) info)->mcuBuffer[n]`. This is a candidate example of replacing pointer arithmetic with a named view type when the underlying layout is known.

source_update_candidates.title: extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp/THPDec.c contains THP decoder matching work
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2618 scoped matching-improvement cleanup to `extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp`, with the only changed file `extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp/THPDec.c` and edits in `__THPDecompressiMCURowNxN`.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful for path-scoped retrieval, but should be curated as a path fact rather than promoted directly from this closed superseded PR.

source_update_candidates.title: Typed overlay/view structs can replace raw offset locals when field ownership is understood
source_update_candidates.text: The PR provides a concrete example of replacing a raw offset-derived pointer local with a named view type for repeated member access. This overlaps with the existing typed-fields-over-pointer-math standard and may be useful as an example rather than a new rule.
source_update_candidates.reason: Candidate example for an existing standard; not enough evidence for a new global standard because the PR was superseded and lacks loaded verifier output.

rejection_notes: Do not record PR #2618 as merged or accepted; metadata shows `merged_at` null and the issue comment says it was superseded by #2632.
Do not treat the preliminary score report as this PR's authoritative validation; the PR body says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting would be authoritative once complete.
Do not infer reviewer intent; there were no review comments in the slice.
Do not assert that `THPFileInfoMCUBufferView` is globally correct or newly defined by this PR; its definition is not present in the loaded evidence.
